title: Clientside Cobblemon (Basic)
description: A modpack designed for Cobblemon, comes with both basic and advanced versions. This being the former. Requires 3gb RAM allocated to run, recommended 4gb.
body:
### THIS PROJECT IS DEAD, AND WILL NOT HAVE SUPPORT FOR FUTURE COBBLEMON UPDATES. MODERN USAGE OF THIS MODPACK IS UNADVISED.
### 

CoolMad's Cobblemon Basic is a clientside modpack designed to work on any Cobblemon server. If a server has a required modpack, this won't work. It includes Mod Menu to showcase all mods and allow configuration.
This version is lightweight and should run well on weaker devices.

Disclaimer: This isn't truly clientside, as it requires the server to already have the mod "Cobblemon" If it has that, you're good to go. This is obvious as it IS a Cobblemon modpack, but I feel I should state it.

*Modrinth Advanced Page:* **https://modrinth.com/modpack/cm-cobblemon**

*Modrinth Basic Page:* **https://modrinth.com/modpack/cm-cobblemon-basic**

*Curseforge Advanced Page:* **https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cm-cobblemon**

*Curseforge Basic Page:* **https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cm-cobblemon-basic**
